name: Dynavap High-Temp O-Ring Kit
summary: The High-Temp O-Ring Kit is essential for maintaining the optimal operation of your DynaVap unit.
description: The High-Temp O-Ring Kit is essential for maintaining the optimal operation of your DynaVap unit. Included are High-Temp O-Rings compatible with Mouthpiece Assemblies, Titanium Tips, OmniVap Condensers, and Stainless Steel Tips. Replacing O-Rings can improve performance and maximise efficiency for your high-quality unit. This trusted information is sourced from the manufacturer. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
